texto: That many if not most people...who want fresh leafy greens in January buy them at the supermarket after they've been bleached and plastic-bag shipped from California or beyond is not a tribute to modern technology
autor: it's an unprecedented abdication of personal responsibility and a ubiquitous benchmark of abnormality.
explicacao: Citação de it's an unprecedented abdication of personal responsibility and a ubiquitous benchmark of abnormality. sobre temas ligados a negocios. “That many if not most people...who want fresh leafy greens in January buy them at the supermarket…” articula negocios, joel-salatin, folks em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como folks e healthier-people.
